problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion may resolve Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
